title: hypericum undulatum var. rotundifolium
intro: Hypericum undulatum var. rotundifolium, also known as the St. John's wort or creeping St. John's wort, is a perennial flowering plant native to New Zealand. It is a member of the St. John's wort family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and mental health disorders, due to its adaptogenic and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Hypericum undulatum var. rotundifolium can be found in teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used to soothe and calm the body and mind.
